parameters.content:
## 🎯 Moharram Bey Content Automation

### Workflow Flow:
1️⃣ Schedule trigger (every 8 hours)
2️⃣ Fetch news from multiple sources
3️⃣ Merge and filter top 5 news
4️⃣ AI analysis with Qwen (via Groq)
5️⃣ Generate social media posts
6️⃣ Create images with AI
7️⃣ Save to Notion for review
8️⃣ Send Telegram notification

### Required Setup:
- Groq API key (free)
- Together AI API key ($25 free credit)
- Notion database
- Telegram bot token
- GNews API key (free tier)

### Notes:
- Runs automatically every 8 hours
- Processes 5 news items per run
- Generates 3 post variations per news
- Creates 1 AI image per news
- All content requires human review before publishing
